login.headline:
Your whole training,
in one place.
login.subheadline: Running today. Gym, diet and more coming soon.
login.signInSubtitle: Connect your Strava account to import your activities.
login.redirectNotice: You'll be redirected to Strava to authorize.
login.readOnlyNotice: Read-only access. Nothing is posted to your profile.

howItWorks.body: Signing in uses Strava's official OAuth flow — you authorize on strava.com, and no password is ever shared with us. Your activities are imported in read-only mode; nothing is posted to your profile. You can disconnect at any time by revoking access in your Strava settings.
